ValidationRule.description: When an open Interaction moves to working status, future nurturing reason is mandatory Source # INC0363966 : Restrict user clicks the Future Nurturing button w/o converting the interaction and select the "Linked to Contact" in Future Nurturing Reason
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(ClosedStatus__c) = 'Future Nurturing' ,ISBLANK(Converted_Date__c) ,OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Turnback_Reason__c)) ,TEXT(Turnback_Reason__c) = 'Linked to Contact' ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_INTERACTION_003: Choose a reason why this is being changed to Future Nurturing except reason Linked to Contact.
